events.summary: v7.8 bootstrap: feature stub created at .claude/features/framework-v7-8-branch-isolation/state.json. Backlog entry added to docs/product/backlog.md High Priority (Architecture & Framework). Trigger incident: HADF Phase 2 fingerprinting campaign (2026-04-30) — long-running launchd-driven background job anchored to canonical repo path instead of an isolated feature/ worktree; wrapper relative writes resolved against launchd WorkingDirectory; canonical jsonl landed in wrong tree; required mid-flight isolation + restart + remerge. Primary deliverable: write-time + cycle-time gate BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION.

State.json + log.json landed on main via PR-I (full-repair-mode plan, Decision 4 = A) on 2026-05-05. Original capture date was 2026-04-30 (kept in state.json::created_at + first log event); this event is the on-main landing event so the PHASE_TRANSITION_NO_LOG gate sees a fresh entry within the 15-min freshness window.

Phase 0 (Research) approved by user. 7 open questions locked into design decisions: Mode B for infra (every commit) + Mode C for non-infra (current_phase mutations); auto-invoke superpowers:using-git-worktrees on gate fire; per-feature isolation_opt_out with infra override; process cwd at write-time + macOS plist scan as advisory; bidirectional PR-list parity for FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS; kill_criteria_resolution required when kill_criteria set + pre-merge-review verification. Synthesis from 3 prior research notes.

Phase 1 (PRD) opened after user approval of Phase 0 exit criteria. PRD scope: lock 7 design decisions into machine-verifiable specs (gate triggers, schema additions, exemption mechanisms, regex patterns, override flows). Authored against research.md decisions section.
